AI Sun Daily Insights in HA.yaml.filename: AI Sun Daily Insights in HA.yaml

description: Every day at 8:05am or 15mins after sunrise (disabled by default), this   automation gathers sun data from the Sun integration, sends it to AI for a fun   summary with interesting facts, and creates a persistent notification.
